item.title: Tasty Dairy Specialities Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amidst Prolonged Downtrend
item.description: Tasty Dairy Specialities Ltd has reached an all-time low, closing just 0.85% above its 52-week low of ₹5.84, marking a significant milestone in its extended period of decline. The stock’s performance continues to lag behind key benchmarks, reflecting ongoing pressures within the FMCG sector and the company’s specific financial metrics. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Naksh Precious Metals Ltd Hits All-Time Low Amid Prolonged Underperformance
item.description: Naksh Precious Metals Ltd, a micro-cap player in the automobiles sector, has reached an all-time low in its stock price, reflecting a sustained period of underperformance relative to market benchmarks and peers. The stock’s recent decline underscores ongoing difficulties in maintaining growth and profitability within a challenging market environment. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Inter Globe Finance Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.54.25 Amidst Weak Financial Metrics
item.description: Inter Globe Finance Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.54.25 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid subdued financial performance and persistent downward trends. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.description: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.106, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid broader market movements and company-specific performance metrics. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Protean eGov Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.510

item.title: DCM Nouvelle Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.106 Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shares of DCM Nouvelle Ltd, a player in the Garments & Apparels sector, declined sharply to hit a fresh 52-week low of Rs.106 on 17 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Lorenzini Apparels Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Lorenzini Apparels Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.5.84 today, marking a significant decline amid ongoing pressures on its financial and market performance. The stock underperformed its sector by 2.48% and closed with a day loss of 1.78%, reflecting persistent challenges over the past year. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: SIS Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.275 Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: SIS Ltd, a key player in the Diversified Commercial Services sector, has reached a new 52-week low of Rs.275, marking a significant decline in its stock price. item.title: Panasonic Energy India Company Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low at Rs.270.1
item.description: Panasonic Energy India Company Ltd’s stock declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.270.1 today, marking a continuation of its downward trend amid subdued financial performance and sector underperformance.
